test_not_tautological.reason: The f2p tests (test_null_key_artifact_links_to_detail_page, test_collection_uses_latest_id_for_null_key, test_keyed_artifact_uses_key_route) only check for string presence in source code. An agent could satisfy them by adding dead code comments containing the expected strings without actually implementing the fix. For example, adding '// "/artifacts/artifact/$id"' and '// "latest_id" in artifact' as comments would pass the text checks.
